item.title: Centinel Spine, Inc.: Prodisc C SK U.S. IMPLANT EXTRA LARGE 5MM. Model: PDSXL5 Total cervical disc replacement. Recall
item.product: Prodisc C SK U.S. IMPLANT EXTRA LARGE 5MM. Model: PDSXL5 Total cervical disc replacement.
item.summary: Product labeling mix up. The prodisc C SK U.S. Implant Extra Large 6mm product was labeled as a 5mm and prodisc C SK U.S. Implant Extra Large 5mm product was labeled as a 6mm. Product details: Prodisc C SK U.S. IMPLANT EXTRA LARGE 5MM. Model: PDSXL5 Total cervical disc replacement.
item.affectedPeople: US Nationwide distribution in the states of AZ, CA, GA, LA, MO, NY, TN, TX.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
